title: High School Jingi
titleNative: はいすくーる仁義
synopsis: The impulsive Yakuza Jouji was ordered by his boss to teach at a misfit-filled school. He now has to settle the score with a fated rival while falling head over heels for a colleague in the process.

tags.name: Yakuza
tags.description: Centered around Japanese organised crime syndicates.

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

tags.name: Teacher
tags.description: Protagonist is an educator, usually in a school setting.

tags.name: Delinquents
tags.description: Features characters with a notorious image and attitude, sometimes referred to as "yankees".

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Mashin Hero Wataru: The Seven Spirits of Ryujinmaru
titleRomaji: Mashin Eiyuuden Wataru: Shichi Kon no Ryuujinmaru
titleEnglish: Mashin Hero Wataru: The Seven Spirits of Ryujinmaru
titleNative: 魔神英雄伝ワタル 七魂の龍神丸
synonyms: Mashin Eiyuuden Wataru: Nana Tamashii no Ryuujinmaru
synopsis: Series protagonist Wataru, who goes to the world Soukaizan in response to a call about an incident there. An evil presence shrouds the area, and the robot Ryuujinmaru's power has been sealed. Together with his friends Shibaraku, Toraou, and Himiko, Wataru begins a new journey. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

title: Re:STARS: Mirai e Tsunagu 2-tsu no Kiraboshi
titleRomaji: Re:STARS: Mirai e Tsunagu 2-tsu no Kiraboshi
titleNative: Re:STARS 〜未来へ繋ぐ2つのきらぼし〜
synopsis: Eita Hoshizora is an 18-year-old college student who has just entered university. From an early age he exceled in singing, but a certain incident makes him unable to sing in front of others. One day, his twin sister Karina Hoshizora, a top idol,asks him to stand on stage in her place. Unable to turn down her selfish sister's request, Eita acts by pretending to be her... but ends up upsetting her sponsors and in a situation where she could be kicked out of the entertainment world! Eita struggles to regain her position as a top idol in the special world of show business, but... In this coming-of-age idol comedy, a sister and brother switch places and live as idols! (Source: Nautiljon & Official Site, Edited) Note: This entry is for the theatrical Japanese release of the Chinese donghua Jintian Kaishi Zuo Mingxing, known as Re:STARS in Japan.

tags.name: Idol
tags.description: Centers around the life and activities of an idol.

tags.name: Twins
tags.description: Prominently features two or more siblings that were born at one birth.

tags.description: Prominently features a character who dresses and behaves in a way characteristic of another gender, or has been transformed into a person of another gender.

title: "RabbiTube" Creator ni Chousen!
titleNative: 『RabbiTube』クリエイターにチャレンジ！
synopsis: In this series, idols face challenges of various themes and send messages to everyone. Unique idols will deliver unique videos. (Source: YouTube description, translated)

title: Big Brother 2
titleNative: 师兄啊师兄 第二季
synonyms: My Senior Brother is Too Steady 2
师兄啊师兄 海神扬名篇
synopsis: Li Changshou, a young man plagued by an incurable disease, is reborn as a qi practitioner in ancient times before the battle for godhood. To gain immortality and survive in the cruel prehistoric times, he keeps a low profile and always weighs his options before taking action. He avoids all danger and hides his strengths, practicing the art of escape while learning how to refine pill poison. Until one day, his master brings a female junior disciple back. Li Changshou, who only wants to cultivate himself in peace, is embroiled in a series of adventures. Most of the time, he remains unruffled, but when he takes action, the power he unleashes is earth-shattering. (Source: Youku.tv)

tags.name: Cultivation
tags.description: Features characters using training, often martial arts-related, and other special methods to cultivate qi (a component of traditional Chinese philosophy, described as "life force") and gain strength or immortality.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

title: X Maiden
titleNative: エクスメイデン
synopsis: In 20XX C.E., a mysterious alien race named Firow suddenly appears on Earth. The Firow's dreadful attacks force humanity to engage in a difficult battle. But humanity's last hope, the X Maiden who wear weapons built to destroy the Firow, are about to set out. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Domo TV
titleNative: どーもくん
synopsis: A co-production between Nickelodeon and NHK featuring the stop-motion character Domo-kun, aired both in the US and Japan.

titleRomaji: Youkai Watch: Soratobu Kujira to Double Sekai no Daibouken da Nyan!
titleNative: 妖怪ウォッチ 空飛ぶクジラとダブル世界の大冒険だニャン!
synopsis: When a giant flying whale suddenly appears over Sakura New Town and its sound is heard the Yo-Kai undergo a transformation. The characters soon realize that as a result they have become corporeal and exist in a material world. This is the third film in the Yok-Kai Watch series based on the hit game.

titleRomaji: Shinshaku Sengoku Eiyuu Densetsu: Sanada Juu Yuushi The Animation
titleNative: 新釈 戦国英雄伝説 眞田十勇士 The Animation
synonyms: New Legend of the Heroes of the Warring Nations - The Ten Sanada Brave Soldiers Sanada 10 TV
synopsis: In the Fifth Year of the Keicho era, the Tokugawa clan sought to solidify their control of Japan. Hidetada Tokugawa has come to the doorsteps of Ueda Castle with the intentions of having the Sanada clan open its doors to him. But the Sanada and their retainers have other plans... (Source: Anime News Network)

(第10,526回 ごめんねえよけけの巻) A preview of "Episode 10,527" appears at the end, however, this is just a teaser—it doesn't actually exist. Omake 2 - Final Episode: Ai Tenshi Sentai Saigo no Tatakai. (最終回 愛天使戦隊最後の戦い) The "Wedding Baseball Tournament" preview of which is shown at the end of the final episode was also never released.

title: Shiratori Reiko de Gozaimasu!
titleNative: 白鳥麗子でございます！
synopsis: 19-year old Reiko is a rich, arrogant, material girl, who refuses to admit her feelings for classmate Tetsuya Akimoto before it's almost too late. Reiko pursues him to Tokyo and enrolls at his university in an attempt to win him back. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Legend of the Mystical Ninja
titleNative: がんばれゴエモン
synopsis: The evil overlord Makuamuge is planning to take over both the game and real worlds, and it is up to the ninja Goemon, his friends, girlfriend, and giant robot to defeat Makuamuge's henchmen and save both worlds.
